extDescription.message: Tune any video: playback speed, smart live-stream sync and audio compression that evens out loud and quiet sounds.

noVideo.message: No video found on the page — open a video and refresh.

liveNote.message: Live stream: manual speed isn't applied — the stream stays at 100% until it needs to catch up. Speed is managed by Live-sync.

syncSubtitle.message: Automatically catch up to the live broadcast

syncHint.message: When the stream falls behind the allowed delay, playback speeds up smoothly — the farther behind, the faster, up to 125% — and returns to 100% at the live edge. It backs off when frames drop or the buffer runs low.

audioSubtitle.message: Even out loud and quiet sounds

audioHint.message: Boosts quiet parts and tames loud ones; make-up gain lifts the overall level. Won't work on sites that serve video cross-origin without CORS — the browser mutes Web Audio there.

audioVotNote.message: A voice-over translation is active — compression is paused so it doesn't interfere.

audioKneeDesc.message: Range around the threshold where the curve bends smoothly.

audioRatioDesc.message: Input dB needed for a 1 dB rise in output.

audioAttackDesc.message: Time to clamp down by 10 dB.

superTheaterHint.message: On YouTube, theater mode fills the whole window; the header auto-hides.
